name: ai-analytics-theme
prompt: Minimal technical architecture diagram in Google's engineering documentation style. White background with ample spacing. Five boxes in horizontal flow connected by thin grey arrows: "Documents" → "Chunking (256 tokens)" → "Embeddings" → "Vector DB" → "LLM Output". Small technology logos below at 30% opacity. Text annotation "k=8 retrieval" with thin line pointing to Vector DB. All boxes are simple rectangles with 1px grey borders. Charcoal text in Inter font. Single ember accent (#D95B43) highlighting the "256" number only. Flat design like diagrams from Google's technical blog.

name: operations-dashboard
prompt: Clean analytics dashboard mockup in Google Analytics style. White background (#FFFFFF). Three metric cards at top showing "$127M saved" (ember orange #D95B43), "99.7% uptime" (green #10B981), "1.2ms latency" (blue #2563EB). Below, a simple line chart with grey grid lines, single smooth upward trending line in ember orange. Right sidebar with small list "Recent Optimizations" in charcoal text. Minimal, flat design. No shadows or gradients. Inter font throughout. Generous padding between elements.

name: ml-platform-architecture
prompt: Simple MLOps platform diagram in Google Cloud Architecture style. White background. Three horizontal layers labeled "Data Ingestion" → "Model Training" → "Deployment". Each layer has 3-4 small rectangular boxes with minimal text. Thin grey connecting lines. Small GCP/AWS/Azure logos at 20% opacity in corner. One ember orange (#D95B43) accent highlighting the "AutoML" component. Clean Inter font. Generous white space. No gradients or 3D effects.

name: language-grid
prompt: Ultra-minimal programming language showcase. Pure white background. 3x3 grid of language names in clean monospace font: "Python | TypeScript | Go" (top row), "React | Node.js | SQL" (middle row), "GraphQL | Docker | K8s" (bottom row). Each cell has very subtle grey border (1px, 10% opacity). One cell (React) highlighted with thin ember orange (#D95B43) border. Lots of padding. No icons, no colors except the single accent. Inspired by Vercel's minimal design language.

name: cloud-platforms
prompt: Clean cloud platform comparison. White background. Three columns with headers "Google Cloud" | "AWS" | "Azure" in charcoal (#1c1c1d). Below each, 5 small grey text items like "BigQuery", "S3", "Cosmos DB" etc. Simple 1px grey borders between columns. Single ember accent (#D95B43) dot next to "BigQuery". Minimal Inter font. No logos, just text. Generous spacing. Flat design aesthetic.

name: devops-pipeline
prompt: Minimalist CI/CD pipeline flow. White background. Five circles connected by thin grey lines in horizontal layout: "Code" → "Build" → "Test" → "Deploy" → "Monitor". Each circle is just a thin grey outline with text inside. The "Deploy" circle has ember orange (#D95B43) outline instead of grey. Below each circle, tiny grey text with examples like "GitHub", "Docker", "Jest", "K8s", "Datadog". Clean, lots of white space, Inter font.

name: impact-metrics
prompt: Clean impact visualization in Apple's keynote style. White background. Large "$100M+" in ember orange (#D95B43) at top. Below, three smaller metrics in charcoal: "Cost Savings Delivered" (subtitle). Then two columns: Left shows "8,000+ Users" and right shows "15+ Countries". All center-aligned. Inter font with varying weights. Generous white space. No decorations, pure typography. Inspired by Apple product announcement slides.

name: berkeley-certificate
prompt: Minimal education credential design. White background. Top: "UC Berkeley" in small charcoal caps. Center: Large "MIDS" in ember orange (#D95B43). Below: "Master of Information and Data Science" in grey. Bottom: "2021-2023 | GPA 3.9" in small charcoal. All center-aligned. Clean Inter font. No borders, no seals, no decorative elements. Pure typographic hierarchy. Lots of white space.

name: patent-filing
prompt: Ultra-simple patent representation. White background. Top left: "US Patent Filed" in small grey caps. Center: Large "ML-DRIVEN OPTIMIZATION SYSTEM" in charcoal (#1c1c1d). Below: Three bullet points in grey: "• Predictive capacity planning", "• Real-time resource allocation", "• Anomaly detection pipeline". Single ember orange (#D95B43) accent on the bullet points. Inter font. No USPTO logos or legal text. Minimal and clean.

name: methodology-framework
prompt: Simple methodology visualization. White background. Three overlapping circles (Venn diagram style) with very thin grey outlines. Circles labeled "Data" (top left), "Engineering" (top right), "Business" (bottom). Intersection area has single word "VALUE" in ember orange (#D95B43). Outside each circle, one small grey text: "Analysis", "Systems", "Strategy". Minimal, geometric, lots of white space. Inter font.

name: innovation-cycle
prompt: Minimal innovation process. White background. Four squares arranged in clockwise pattern connected by thin curved grey arrows: "Observe" → "Ideate" → "Build" → "Measure" → (back to Observe). Each square is just text, no borders. One square ("Build") in ember orange (#D95B43), others in charcoal. Center of arrangement has small grey text "Iterate". Very clean, lots of padding. Flat design inspired by Material Design principles.

name: principles-list
prompt: Clean principles typography. White background. Title "Core Principles" in small grey caps at top. Below, four lines of text, each starting with a number in ember orange (#D95B43): "1. Data drives decisions", "2. Automation over repetition", "3. Simplicity scales", "4. Impact matters". Numbers in ember, text in charcoal (#1c1c1d). Clean Inter font. Left-aligned. Generous line spacing. No bullets, icons, or decorations.

name: hero-banner
prompt: Minimal hero banner design. White background taking up full space. Center: "Building Intelligence" in large charcoal (#1c1c1d) text. Below in smaller grey: "Data • Engineering • Impact". Single thin horizontal line in ember orange (#D95B43) below the text, about 1/3 the width of the text. Absolutely minimal. No graphics, no patterns, just typography and one accent line. Inter font.

name: contact-card
prompt: Ultra-minimal contact card design. White background. Center-aligned text stack: "Let's Build Together" in charcoal (#1c1c1d), medium size. Below, smaller grey text: "mark@example.com". Below that, three tiny grey links separated by vertical bars: "GitHub | LinkedIn | Resume". One element (email) underlined with thin ember orange (#D95B43) line. No icons, no buttons, pure text. Lots of white space around. Inter font.

name: process-flow
prompt: Simple process flow visualization. White background. Five rectangles in a horizontal line, connected by thin grey arrows. Rectangles contain: "Define", "Research", "Design", "Build", "Deploy". All rectangles are borderless, just text. The "Build" rectangle text is in ember orange (#D95B43), others in charcoal. Below the entire flow, small grey text: "Iterative • Agile • Data-Driven". Minimal Inter font. Generous white space.
